title: Dwell in Us
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: O people of Sion, behold, the Lord will come to save the nations, and the Lord will make the glory of his voice heard in the joy of your heart.

title: Psalm 72
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: Justice shall flourish in his time, and fullness of peace for ever.

title: Luke 3:4, 6
author: SP2026
snippet: Prepare the way of the Lord, make straight his paths; All flesh shall see the salvation of God.

title: Come, Emmanuel
author: Trevor Thomson
snippet: Come, O God, within our hearts, within our souls. Come, O God, with healing pow’r renew us.

title: LR-9
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Jerusalem, arise and stand upon the heights, and behold the joy which comes to you from God.

title: Come, Lord! Maranatha
author: Ricky Manalo CSP
snippet: Now is the time; prepare the way; salvation is close at hand. Make straight the paths of the Lord. Lift up your voices and pray:

title: Come To Us
author: Greg Walton
snippet: Scattered and broken, bent in our way, we are your people gathered to praise you. A vineyard uprooted, narrow in sight. Come, Lord of Glory! Come, Lord of Light!

title: Soon and Very Soon
author: Andrae Crouch
snippet: Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King; Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King; Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King; Hallelujah! Hallelujah! We’re going to see the King.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
